summary: Iteration 15: Admin Financial Tab (Financeiro) testing completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright: Financial tab displays all required cards with correct values matching expected data. Commission config with input and save button working.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/financial returns all required fields (gross_revenue, client_token_revenue, est_package_revenue, total_commissions_paid, net_revenue, balance_to_settle)

verified_features.feature: Financial tab displays Receita Bruta card with breakdown
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows R$ 420,00 with Tokens (Clientes) R$ 420,00 and Pacotes (Estabelecimentos) R$ 0,00

verified_features.feature: Financial tab displays Comissoes Pagas card
Financial tab displays Receita Liquida (Lucro iToke) card with blue highlight border
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows R$ 363,00 with blue border highlight

verified_features.feature: Financial tab displays Saldo a Liquidar card
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows R$ 49,50 with description about pending withdrawals

verified_features.feature: Commission config input shows current value (10%) with save button
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows input with value '10', '%' suffix, and 'Salvar' button

verified_features.feature: Admin tabs: Visao Geral | Financeiro | Usuarios
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows all three tabs with Financeiro in the middle

verified_features.feature: Client and Establishment screens remain unchanged (dark theme)
verified_features.verification: Screenshots confirm dark background (#0F172A) on home/client/establishment screens

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/financial correctly aggregates data from token_purchases, token_packages, transactions, and establishments collections
Commission calculation: gross_revenue = client_token_revenue + est_package_revenue, net_revenue = gross_revenue - total_commissions_paid
Balance to settle correctly sums withdrawable_balance from all establishments
PUT /api/admin/settings validates commission_percent between 0-100 with proper error messages
platform_settings collection stores global commission config with upsert behavior
All admin endpoints properly check user.role == 'admin' and return 403 for non-admin users
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Financial tab (Financeiro) fully implemented and tested. Financial data comes from real MongoDB collections: token_purchases (client buys), token_packages (establishment buys), transactions (commission payments), establishments (withdrawable_balance). Commission config stored in platform_settings collection with default 10%. All admin endpoints require admin role. Client/Establishment screens unchanged with dark theme.
